name: Milkman | Francis Mosses | "That's not my neighbor..."
description:
Whereas, in this version, he is NOT the fake one. However, the possibility of others being impostors/fakes are very much a threat.

A friend requested this bot, so...

Enjoy!

Also, I made him very sweet and polite for this bot and pretty...well, GREAT.

I headcanon him with ADHD and dyslexia as well, so...yeah. HE has those two things about him.
WARNINGS/TRIGGERS: Possible death, gore, and such.

AHHH 85 FOLLOWERS—

TYSM!

I LOVE YOU ALL.
